debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq R
inst✝ : DivisionRing R
h : Fintype R
Z : Subring R := center R
n : ℕ
H : ∃ x y, x ≠ y
h_n : n ≠ 0
q : ℕ := Fintype.card ↥Z
h_card : Fintype.card R = q ^ n
finclassa : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑A.carrier
this✝² : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑{Quotient.out A}.centralizer
fintypea : ConjClasses Rˣ →
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1} :=
  fun A =>
    setFintype
      {A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
this✝¹ :
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
S' : Set (ConjClasses Rˣ) := ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ
this✝ : Fintype ↑S'
S : Finset (ConjClasses Rˣ) := S'.toFinset
n_k : ↑S' → ℕ := sorry
h_R : Fintype.card Rˣ = q ^ n - 1
h_Z : Fintype.card (↥Z)ˣ = q - 1
H1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ x ∈ (ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ).toFinset, x.carrier.toFinset.card
e : ↥(Subgroup.center Rˣ) ≃* (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ := Subgroup.centerUnitsEquivUnitsCenter R
f : (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ ≃ (↥Z)ˣ := Equiv.inv (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ
this : ∀ (A : ↑S'), Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier * (q ^ n_k A - 1) = q ^ n - 1
h1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ A, (q ^ n - 1) / (q ^ n_k A - 1)
hZ : Nonempty ↥Z
hq_pow_pos : ∀ (m : ℕ), 1 ≤ q ^ m
h_n_k_A_dvd : ∀ (A : ↑S'), n_k A ∣ n
hq : q = Fintype.card ↥(center R)
h₁_dvd : eval (↑q) (phi n) ∣ eval (↑q) (X ^ n - 1)
A : ↑S'
hs : A ∈ univ
⊢ 1 ≠ n_k A

have h_phi_dvd_q_sub_one : (phi n).eval (q : ℤ) ∣ (((q - (1 : ℕ)) : ℕ ) : ℤ) := by
    have hq : q = (Fintype.card { x // x ∈ center R }) := by rfl
    have h₁_dvd : (phi n).eval (q : ℤ) ∣ ((X : ℤ[X])  ^ n - 1).eval (q : ℤ)  := by
      exact eval_dvd <| phi_dvd n
    have h₂_dvd :
        (phi n).eval (q : ℤ) ∣ ∑ A : S', (((q ^ n - 1) : ℕ):ℤ) / ((q ^ (n_k A) - 1) : ℕ):= by
      refine Finset.dvd_sum fun A hs ↦ (Int.dvd_div_of_mul_dvd ?_)
      have h_one_neq: 1 ≠ n_k A := by sorry
      have h_k_dvd_n : n_k A ∣ n := h_n_k_A_dvd A
      have h_k_lt_n : n_k A < n := by
        refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp h_n) h_k_dvd_n) ?_
        intro h_eq
        rw [h_eq] at this
        specialize this A
        rw [tsub_self, Nat.pow_zero] at this
        -- If n_k A = n, then q^n_k A - 1 = q^n - 1.
        -- Then card A * (q^n - 1) = q^n - 1.
        -- So card A = 1.
        -- But A ∈ S' implies card A > 1.
        have h_card : Fintype.card A.1.carrier = 1 :=
          Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_right (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
             intro h0
             rw [h0] at this
             simp at this)) this
        have h_gt : Fintype.card A.1.carrier > 1 := A.2
        linarith
      
      rw [sub_eq_add_neg, ← poly_eval_X_pow_sub_one_mul_cyclotomic (q : ℤ) n (n_k A) h_k_dvd_n h_k_lt_n]
      rw [phi]
      apply dvd_mul_left
    
    -- The class equation: q^n - 1 = q - 1 + sum ...
    -- phi n | q^n - 1 (h₁_dvd)
    -- phi n | sum ... (h₂_dvd)
    -- So phi n | q - 1.
    rw [h1] at h₁_dvd
    exact (Int.dvd_add_left h₂_dvd).mp h₁_dvd

        exact A.2 (ConjClasses.mem_center_iff.mpr h_x_central)

intro h
        rw [h] at this
        specialize this A
        simp [h_R, h_Z] at this
        have h_card_A : Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier A) = 1 := by
           rw [this]
           apply Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_right (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (one_lt_pow h_n (one_lt_iff_ne_zero_and_ne_one.mpr ⟨Fintype.card_ne_zero, by sorry⟩))) rfl
        exact (Set.mem_setOf.mp (A.2)).ne (h_card_A).symm
      apply phi_div_2 n (n_k A) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A))
      intro h
      rw [h] at this
      specialize this A
      simp at this
      exact (Set.mem_setOf.mp A.2).ne this.symm

intro h_eq
        specialize this A
        rw [h_eq] at this
        simp only [pow_one] at this
        have hq : 1 < q := Fintype.one_lt_card
        have h_card_A : Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) = (q ^ n - 1) / (q - 1) := by
          apply Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_right (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt hq) this.symm
        obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := Quotient.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)
        have h_orb := orbit_stabilizer (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)
        rw [hx, h_R, h_card_A] at h_orb
        have h_stab_card : Fintype.card (MulAction.stabilizer (ConjAct Rˣ) x) = q - 1 := by
          have h_nz : (q ^ n - 1) / (q - 1) ≠ 0 := by
            refine Nat.div_ne_zero (Nat.sub_dvd_pow_sub (q : ℕ) 1 n) ?_
            exact Nat.sub_le_sub_right (le_of_lt (one_lt_pow n hq h_n)) 1
          have h_cancel : (q ^ n - 1) / (q - 1) * Fintype.card (MulAction.stabilizer (ConjAct Rˣ) x) = (q ^ n - 1) / (q - 1) * (q - 1) := by
            rw [h_orb, Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.sub_dvd_pow_sub (q : ℕ) 1 n)]
          exact Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_nz) h_cancel
        have h_Cx_card : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) = q := by
          let S := Subring.centralizer {x}
          have : Fintype S := setFintype _
          have : Fintype Sˣ := Fintype.ofFinite _
          have : Fintype.card S = Fintype.card Sˣ + 1 := Fintype.card_eq_card_units_add_one S
          rw [this, ← Fintype.card_congr (ConjAct_stabilizer_centralizer_eq x).toEquiv, h_stab_card]
          exact Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hq)
        have h_Z_le : Z ≤ Subring.centralizer {x} := by
          intro z hz y hy
          rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
          subst hy
          exact Subring.mem_center_iff.mp hz x
        have h_Z_eq : Z = Subring.centralizer {x} := by
           refine SetLike.ext' (Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le h_Z_le ?_)
           rw [h_Cx_card]; rfl
        have h_x_Z : x ∈ Z := h_Z_eq.symm ▸ Subring.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr (fun _ h => (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp h) ▸ rfl)
        have h_A_one : Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) = 1 := by
          rw [← hx]
          apply Fintype.card_eq_one_of_forall_eq
          intro y hy
          rcases (ConjClasses.mem_carrier_iff.mp hy) with ⟨g, rfl⟩
          rw [ConjAct.smul_def, mul_inv_eq_iff_eq_mul, mul_assoc, mul_comm, ← Subring.mem_center_iff.mp h_x_Z, mul_comm, mul_inv_cancel_right]
        have h_A_gt : 1 < Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) := A.2
        rw [h_A_one] at h_A_gt
        exact Nat.lt_asymm h_A_gt h_A_gt

intro h
        have h_card_A : 1 < Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) := (Set.mem_setOf.mp A.2).2
        have h_orb := orbit_stabilizer A
        rw [h_R, this A, h, pow_one] at h_orb
        have h_cent_sz := Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (pos_of_gt h_card_A) h_orb
        let x := ConjClasses.exists_rep A|>.choose
        let D := Subring.centralizer {(x : R)}
        have h_D_sz : Fintype.card D = q := by
          rw [Fintype.card_eq_card_units_add_one D, ← h_cent_sz]
          congr 1
          exact Fintype.card_congr {
            toFun := fun u => ⟨⟨u.1, u.2.1⟩, u.2.2⟩
            invFun := fun u => ⟨u.1, ⟨u.1.2, u.2⟩⟩
            left_inv := fun _ => rfl
            right_inv := fun _ => rfl
          }
        have h_eq : Z = D := by
          apply Subring.ext; intro z
          have h_le : Z ≤ D := Subring.center_le_centralizer {(x : R)}
          have h_card : Fintype.card Z = Fintype.card D := by rw [h_D_sz]; rfl
          rw [Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le h_le (ge_of_eq h_card)]
        have h_cent : x ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
          rw [Subgroup.mem_center_iff]; intro y; apply Units.ext
          rw [← Subring.mem_center_iff, h_eq]; exact Subring.mem_centralizer_self
        have hA : A = ConjClasses.mk x := (ConjClasses.exists_rep A).choose_spec.symm
        rw [hA, ConjClasses.card_carrier_eq_one_iff_mem_center.mpr h_cent] at h_card_A
        contradiction

intro h
        specialize this A
        rw [h] at this
        simp only [pow_one] at this
        let x := Quotient.out A.1
        have h_cent : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) = q - 1 := by
          have h_orb : Fintype.card Rˣ =
              Fintype.card A.1.carrier * Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) := by
            rw [← ConjAct.orbit_eq_carrier_conjClasses, ← ConjAct_stabilizer_centralizer_eq]
            exact MulAction.card_orbit_mul_card_stabilizer_eq_card_group (ConjAct Rˣ) x
          rw [h_R, ← this, mul_comm] at h_orb
          exact Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr ⟨x⟩) h_orb
        have h_eq : (Subgroup.center Rˣ : Set Rˣ) = Set.centralizer {x} := by
          refine Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le (fun z hz ↦ ?_) ?_
          · rw [Set.mem_centralizer_iff]
            intro g hg
            rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hg
            subst hg
            exact Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz x
          · rw [h_cent, Fintype.card_congr e, h_Z]
        have h_cen : x ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
          rw [h_eq]
          exact fun _ h => (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp h).symm
        exact A.2 (ConjClasses.mk_mem_center_iff.mpr h_cen)

intro heq
        specialize this A
        rw [← heq, pow_one] at this
        have h_orb := orbit_stabilizer (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)
        rw [h_R, this] at h_orb
        have h_cent : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {ConjClasses.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) |>.choose}) = q - 1 :=
          Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by have := A.prop; linarith) h_orb
        have h_eq : (Subgroup.center Rˣ : Set Rˣ) = Set.centralizer {ConjClasses.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) |>.choose} :=
          Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le (Subgroup.center_subset_centralizer _) (by rw [h_cent, Fintype.card_congr e.toEquiv, h_Z])
        have h_mem : ConjClasses.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) |>.choose ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
          rw [h_eq]; exact Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr fun _ _ ↦ rfl
        rw [← ConjClasses.mem_center_iff, ConjClasses.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) |>.choose_spec] at h_mem
        have : 1 < Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) := A.prop
        have : Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) = 1 := h_mem
        linarith

intro h
        specialize this A
        rw [← h, pow_one] at this
        have h_orb := orbit_stabilizer A.1
        rw [h_R, ← this, mul_assoc, mul_eq_mul_left_iff] at h_orb
        have h_cent_card := h_orb.resolve_left (ne_of_gt (zero_lt_one.trans A.2))
        rw [← h_Z, ← Fintype.card_congr (e.trans f)] at h_cent_card
        let x := (ConjClasses.exists_rep A.1).choose
        have h_cent_eq : Set.centralizer {x} = (Subgroup.center Rˣ : Set Rˣ) := by
          apply Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le _ h_cent_card.symm.le
          intro z hz
          exact Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr fun g hg ↦ by
            rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hg
            subst hg
            exact Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz x
        have h_x_cent : IsCentral x := Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp <| h_cent_eq ▸ Set.mem_centralizer rfl
        have h_card_one : Fintype.card A.1.carrier = 1 := ConjClasses.card_carrier_eq_one_iff_mem_center.mpr h_x_cent
        have h_card_gt : 1 < Fintype.card A.1.carrier := A.2
        linarith

intro h
        rw [h, pow_one] at this
        specialize this A
        let x := Quotient.out A.val
        have h_stab : Fintype.card (MulAction.stabilizer (ConjAct Rˣ) x) = q - 1 :=
          Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left Fintype.card_pos <| by
            rw [← this, mul_comm, ← ConjAct.orbit_eq_carrier_conjClasses,
              MulAction.card_orbit_mul_card_stabilizer_eq_card_group (ConjAct Rˣ) x, h_R]
        have h_cent : x ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
          have h_le : Subgroup.center Rˣ ≤ MulAction.stabilizer (ConjAct Rˣ) x :=
            fun z hz ↦ MulAction.mem_stabilizer_iff.mpr <| ConjAct.smul_def.trans <|
              mul_inv_eq_iff_eq_mul.mpr (Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz x).symm
          have h_card : Fintype.card (Subgroup.center Rˣ) = q - 1 := by
            rw [Fintype.card_congr e, Fintype.card_congr f, h_Z]
          rw [← SetLike.mem_coe, Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le h_le (by rw [h_card, h_stab])]
          exact MulAction.mem_stabilizer_iff.mpr (by simp [ConjAct.smul_def])
        have h1 : Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier A.val) = 1 :=
          ConjClasses.carrier_eq_singleton_iff.mpr ⟨x, (Quotient.out_eq A.val).symm, h_cent⟩
        have h2 : 1 < Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier A.val) := ConjClasses.mem_noncenter.mp A.property
        rw [h1] at h2
        exact Nat.lt_asymm h2 h2

sorried.
      -- We assume the contradiction holds.
      sorry

intro h
        specialize this A
        rw [← h, pow_one] at this
        have h_q_pos : 1 < q := Fintype.one_lt_card_iff_nontrivial.mpr ((Subring.center R).toSubsemiring.nontrivial_of_nontrivial _)
        have h_cent_units_card : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {Quotient.out (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)}) = q - 1 := by
           have h_orb := orbit_stabilizer (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)
           rw [h_R] at h_orb
           rw [this] at h_orb
           refine Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left Fintype.card_pos h_orb
        have h_cent_card : Fintype.card (Subring.centralizer {(Quotient.out (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) : R)}) = q := by
           rw [← Fintype.card_eq_card_units_add_one (Subring.centralizer _)]
           rw [h_cent_units_card]
           exact Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt h_q_pos)
        have h_Z_eq_cent : Z = Subring.centralizer {(Quotient.out (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) : R)} := by
           apply Fintype.card_eq_of_le_of_card_le
           · exact Subring.center_le_centralizer _
           · rw [h_cent_card]; exact le_of_eq hq.symm
        have h_in_center : (Quotient.out (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) : R) ∈ Z := by
           rw [h_Z_eq_cent]; exact Subring.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr (fun _ _ => rfl)
        have h_central : Quotient.out (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
           rw [Subring.mem_center_iff] at h_in_center
           exact Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mpr (fun y => h_in_center y y.2)
        have h_sz_one : Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) = 1 :=
           ConjClasses.card_carrier_eq_one_iff_mem_center.mpr h_central
        have h_gt_one : 1 < Fintype.card (ConjClasses.carrier (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)) := (A.2)
        rw [h_sz_one] at h_gt_one
        exact lt_asymm h_gt_one h_gt_one

intro h_eq
        have h_orb := this A
        rw [h_eq, pow_one, ← h_R, mul_comm] at h_orb
        obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := ConjClasses.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)
        have h_stab : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) = q - 1 :=
          Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left Fintype.card_pos <| by
            rwa [MulAction.card_orbit_mul_card_stabilizer_eq_card_group (ConjAct Rˣ) x,
                 ConjAct.orbit_eq_carrier_conjClasses]
        have h_cent : (Subgroup.center Rˣ).carrier = Set.centralizer {x} :=
          Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le (fun z hz ↦ Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr
            (Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz x)) (by rw [h_stab, Fintype.card_congr
            (Subgroup.centerUnitsEquivUnitsCenter R), h_Z])
        exact (ConjClasses.mem_noncenter.mp A.2) (h_cent.symm ▸ Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr fun _ h ↦ h ▸ rfl)

intro h
        have h_eq := this A
        rw [← h, pow_one] at h_eq
        have h_orb := orbit_stabilizer A
        rw [h_R] at h_orb
        rw [← h_eq, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_eq_mul_left_iff] at h_orb
        rcases h_orb with h_cent | h_zero
        · have h_sz : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {ConjClasses.exists_rep A|>.choose}) = Fintype.card (Subgroup.center Rˣ) := by
            rw [h_cent, Fintype.card_congr e, h_Z]
          have h_eq_center : Set.centralizer {ConjClasses.exists_rep A|>.choose} = Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
            refine Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le (fun x hx g ↦ ?_) (le_of_eq h_sz.symm)
            rw [mem_center_iff] at hx
            exact (hx g).symm
          have : ConjClasses.exists_rep A|>.choose ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
            rw [← h_eq_center]
            exact Set.mem_centralizer rfl
          exact (ConjClasses.mem_noncenter.mp A.2) (ConjClasses.card_carrier_eq_one_iff_mem_center.mpr this)
        · exact (ne_of_gt (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr (ConjClasses.carrier_nonempty A))) h_zero
      have h_k_dvd_n : n_k A ∣ n := h_n_k_A_dvd A
      have h_n_k_lt_n : n_k A < n := by
        refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) h_k_dvd_n) ?_
        intro h_eq
        rw [h_eq] at h_one_neq
        have : n ≠ 1 := by
           intro h_n1
           rw [h_n1] at h_one_neq
           exact h_one_neq rfl
        -- If n_k A = n, then centralizer is R, so A is central.
        -- We can deduce this from 'this' if needed, but let's rely on standard cyclotomic divisibility
        -- which usually requires proper divisor.
        -- Actually, for the division of polynomials, we just need k | n.
        -- But for the integer division to correspond to Phi_n, we need Phi_n | (q^n-1)/(q^k-1).
        -- This holds if n doesn't divide k (which implies k < n since k|n).
        sorry 
      rw [← (Int.ofNat_sub (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (hq_pow_pos (n_k A)) h_one_neq.symm))),
          ← (Int.ofNat_sub (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (hq_pow_pos n) (by
              intro hn
              rw [← hn, Nat.pow_zero] at h_card
              exact Fintype.card_ne_one R h_card)))),
          ← eval_sub, ← eval_sub, ← eval_pow, ← eval_pow]
      exact phi_div_2 n (n_k A) h_k_dvd_n h_n_k_lt_n
    
    rw [h1] at h₁_dvd
    simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_sub (hq_pow_pos n), Nat.cast_sum, Nat.cast_div_charZero] at h₁_dvd
    rw [← Int.ofNat_sub (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (hq_pow_pos n) (by
             intro hn
             rw [← hn, Nat.pow_zero] at h_card
             exact Fintype.card_ne_one R h_card)))] at h₁_dvd
    simp only [Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_one] at h₂_dvd
    exact Int.dvd_of_dvd_add_left h₂_dvd h₁_dvd
  
  -- The final step of the Wedderburn theorem
  -- |Phi_n(q)| > q - 1 for n > 1.
  -- But we need n > 1.
  sorry

intro h
    have h_card := this A
    rw [h, pow_one] at h_card
    let x := ConjClasses.exists_rep (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)|>.choose
    have h_orbit := orbit_stabilizer (A : ConjClasses Rˣ)
    rw [h_R, ← h_card] at h_orbit
    have h_cent : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) = q - 1 :=
      Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr ⟨x, ConjClasses.exists_rep _ |>.choose_spec⟩).ne' h_orbit
    have h_subset : (Subgroup.center Rˣ : Set Rˣ) ⊆ Set.centralizer {x} :=
      fun z hz y hy ↦ by
        rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy; subst hy;
        exact Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz x
    have h_eq : (Subgroup.center Rˣ : Set Rˣ) = Set.centralizer {x} :=
       Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le h_subset (by rw [h_cent, ← h_Z, ← Fintype.card_congr e])
    have h_mem : x ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by rw [h_eq]; exact Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr fun _ h ↦ h ▸ rfl
    have h_center : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) ∈ ConjClasses.center Rˣ := by
      rw [ConjClasses.mem_center_iff]
      exact ⟨x, ConjClasses.exists_rep _ |>.choose_spec, h_mem⟩
    exact (ConjClasses.mem_noncenter_iff.mp A.2) h_center

intro h
        let x := ConjClasses.exists_rep A|>.choose
        have hx_eq : A = ConjClasses.mk x := (ConjClasses.exists_rep A).choose_spec.symm
        have h_orb : Fintype.card Rˣ = Fintype.card A.carrier * Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) := by
          rw [hx_eq, ConjClasses.carrier_mk]
          have := MulAction.card_orbit_mul_card_stabilizer_eq_card_group (ConjAct Rˣ) x
          rwa [ConjAct.orbit_eq_carrier_conjClasses, ← ConjClasses.carrier_mk] at this
        have h_eq : Fintype.card A.carrier * (q - 1) = Fintype.card Rˣ := by
          rw [h_R, eq_comm]
          have := this ⟨A, hs⟩
          rwa [h, pow_one] at this
        have h_cent_card : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer {x}) = q - 1 := by
           rw [h_eq] at h_orb
           refine Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left ?_ h_orb
           rw [Finset.mem_coe] at hs
           exact lt_trans zero_lt_one hs
        have h_center_card : Fintype.card (Subgroup.center Rˣ) = q - 1 := by
          rw [Fintype.card_congr e, h_Z]
        have h_x_in_center : x ∈ Subgroup.center Rˣ := by
           have h_sub : (Subgroup.center Rˣ : Set Rˣ) ⊆ Set.centralizer {x} := by
             intro z hz
             rw [Set.mem_centralizer_iff]
             exact fun g _ => Subgroup.mem_center_iff.mp hz g
           have h_eq_sets := Set.eq_of_subset_of_card_le h_sub (by rw [h_cent_card, h_center_card])
           rw [← h_eq_sets]
           exact Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mpr fun _ _ => rfl
        have h_A_card : Fintype.card A.carrier = 1 := by
           rw [hx_eq, ConjClasses.card_carrier_mk_eq_one_iff_mem_center]
           exact h_x_in_center
        rw [Finset.mem_coe] at hs
        linarith

      have h_nk_lt_n : n_k A < n := by
        refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)) ?_
        intro h_eq
        have h_contr := this ⟨A, hs⟩
        rw [h_eq] at h_contr
        have h_card_A : Fintype.card A.carrier = 1 := by
           apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_right (tsub_pos_of_lt (one_lt_pow n q (by linarith))) h_contr
        rw [Finset.mem_coe] at hs
        linarith

      have h_dvd_poly := phi_div_2 n (n_k A) (h_n_k_A_dvd A) h_nk_lt_n
      have h_eval := eval_dvd h_dvd_poly
      rw [eval_mul, eval_sub, eval_pow, eval_one, eval_X] at h_eval
      convert h_eval
      rw [Int.mul_ediv_cancel']
      exact (Int.dvd_sub_pow_of_dvd_sub (Int.dvd_pow_sub_pow_of_dvd_sub (by rfl) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)))
